subject: Cannot login to my account
description: I forgot my password and I'm locked out of my Active Directory account. Please reset ASAP.
reasoning: Clear request to reset a forgotten AD password causing login lockout.
resolution_notes: Temporary password issued; user prompted to set a new one at next login.
email_body:
Subject: Re: Cannot login to my account – Ticket INC001

Hi John,

We’ve automatically reset your password for ticket INC001. Please use the temporary password we sent to sign in, then set a new password when prompted. If you still can’t access your account, just reply to this ticket and we’ll help further.

Thanks,  
IT Support
actions_log: [2026-06-20T04:18:05Z] Ticket finalized — status=Auto-Resolved group=Identity & Access Team
